desc: Build the timing-only RX discriminator per done/2026-07-14-t6040-dockchannel-rx-path-delta.md step 1 (ticket 049 output): reuse the telemetry kernel + DT unchanged (hashes in done/2026-07-14-t6040-dockchannel-rxirq-txpoll.md), new initramfs only — print one wait-6s instruction marker, stay TX-silent 10s, accept exactly one IRQ_BIT1_PROBE in the quiet window, then report FIFO/flag/mask/AIC telemetry over polled TX. No kernel MMIO change. Successful ingress attributes the zero-ingress result to turnaround/concurrent TX, not AIC or mask programming. Pin hashes, static review, then propose the rig ticket. Do NOT combine with TX priming (step 2 is a separate gated experiment).
author: claude
